allow: Bash(git add "assets/City background sky.png" "assets/City background sky.png.import" "assets/Male Skin1.png" "assets/Male Skin1.png.import" assets/character1.png assets/character1.png.import assets/character2.png assets/character2.png.import assets/character_idle.png assets/character_idle.png.import assets/character_idle2.png assets/character_idle2.png.import assets/character_running.png assets/character_running.png.import assets/character_walk.png assets/character_walk.png.import assets/tilemap/ "assets/ui/Keyboard Black.png" "assets/ui/Keyboard Black.png.import" components/ entities/npc/ entities/player/ scenes/base_camp/ shaders/pixel_outline.gdshader shaders/pixel_outline.gdshader.uid shaders/sprite_outline.gdshader shaders/sprite_outline.gdshader.uid ui/chase_bar/)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Category→HandRank, Ornament→Gear 리네임 + Base Camp/Player 추가

- Category를 HandRank로, Ornament를 Gear로 전면 리네임
- Base Camp 씬 + Player FSM \(Idle/Run states\) + NPC Shop 추가
- Chase Bar UI, Interactable 컴포넌트 추가
- 캐릭터/타일맵 에셋 추가, 미사용 파일 정리

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add components/interacting_component.gd globals/scoring.gd globals/state_machine/states/post_roll_state.gd globals/state_machine/states/conversion_state.gd ui/score_display/score_display.gd && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
코드 품질 개선: 매 프레임 정렬 제거, 매직 스트링/중복 코드 정리

- interacting_component: _process 매 프레임 정렬 → 이벤트 기반 _needs_sort 플래그
- "burst" 매직 스트링 → Scoring.BURST_ID 상수로 추출
- conversion_state: 중복 _on_distance/time_selected → _apply_conversion 통합
- score_display: 중복 odometer 셋업 코드 → _setup_odometer 헬퍼 추출

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add CLAUDE.md components/interacting_component.gd entities/dice/dice.gd entities/dice_manager/dice_manager.gd entities/dice_manager/dice_manager.tscn globals/game_state.gd globals/state_machine/states/conversion_state.gd globals/state_machine/states/conversion_state.gd.uid globals/state_machine/states/post_roll_state.gd globals/state_machine/states/pre_roll_state.gd globals/state_machine/states/setup_state.gd scenes/game/game.gd scenes/game/game.tscn ui/action_bar/action_bar.gd ui/action_bar/action_bar.tscn ui/conversion_ui/conversion_ui.gd ui/conversion_ui/conversion_ui.gd.uid ui/conversion_ui/conversion_ui.tscn ui/score_display/score_display.gd ui/score_display/score_display.tscn)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
POST_ROLL UI 리팩터: Fan layout + Nitro/Smoke 즉시 치환 + ConversionState 제거

- Active 주사위 fan layout \(부채꼴 배치\) 구현
- Stand/Conversion 2단계 → Nitro\(거리\)/Smoke\(시간\) 1단계 즉시 치환
- Double Down을 리롤 모드로 이동
- ScoreDisplay를 BBCode RichTextLabel로 교체
- ConversionState/ConversionUI/PendingScore 삭제 \(dead code 정리\)
- Phase.CONVERSION enum 값 제거, dice_spacing export 제거

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add project.godot scenes/base_camp/base_camp.gd scenes/base_camp/base_camp.tscn scenes/base_camp/subpixel_camera.gd scenes/base_camp/subpixel_camera.gd.uid scenes/main.gd scenes/main.gd.uid scenes/main.tscn scenes/subpixel.gdshader scenes/subpixel.gdshader.uid)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
씬 매니저 추가: main.tscn → game/base_camp 동적 전환

- main.tscn을 루트 씬 매니저로 추가 \(go_to\(Scene\) API\)
- base_camp에 SubViewport + subpixel shader 내장 \(384x216 뷰포트 대응\)
- subpixel_camera.gd: follow_speed @export, get_viewport\(\) 기반 material 참조
- Tab 키로 game ↔ base_camp 즉시 전환 \(debug_swap_scene\)
- Inspector에서 start_scene 드롭다운으로 기본 씬 선택 가능

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
